mapper.sql: login_type_id, login_type_name, login_type_code, login_type_description, login_type_config, is_active, sort_order, enterprise_id, creator_id, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT lt.login_type_id, lt.login_type_name, lt.login_type_code, lt.login_type_description, lt.login_type_config, lt.is_active, lt.sort_order, lt.enterprise_id, lt.creator_id, lt.create_time, lt.update_by, lt.update_time, COUNT(s.script_id) AS script_count FROM datacloud_login_type lt LEFT JOIN datacloud_script s ON lt.login_type_id = s.login_type_id WHERE lt.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND lt.is_active = 1 GROUP BY lt.login_type_id ORDER BY lt.sort_order ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_login_types, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 THEN 1 END) AS active_login_types, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_active = 0 THEN 1 END) AS inactive_login_types FROM datacloud_login_type WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
